name: Customer Profile
description: Core customer master record including contact details, preferences, and account history.

name: Order History
description: Historical record of all customer orders including line items, pricing, fulfilment status, and returns.

name: Product Catalogue
description: Master product catalogue containing SKUs, descriptions, pricing, categories, and availability.

name: Sales Lead
description: Prospective customer or sales opportunity record tracked through the sales pipeline.

name: Promotional Campaign
description: Definition and rules for a promotional campaign including eligibility, discount type, and validity period.

name: Analytics Event
description: Structured event record capturing user actions and system events for analytics and reporting.

name: Stock Level
description: Current and projected inventory stock levels per SKU per location.

name: Payment Transaction
description: Payment authorisation and settlement record including masked card details, amount, and status.

name: Employee Record
description: Employee master record including personal details, role, salary band, and employment history.

name: Shipment
description: Outbound shipment record including carrier, tracking number, items, and delivery status.

name: Supplier Record
description: Supplier master data including contact details, terms, and product categories. Ownership migrated from retired Supplier Portal.
